examples.text: مُسَاعَدَة الجِيرَان فِي الأَوْقَات الصُّعْبَة هِي قِيمَة مَعْرُوفَة.
examples.english: Helping neighbors in difficult times is a well-known value.

examples.text: التَّسَاهُل وَالاِحْتِرَام المُتَبَادِل هُمَا عَلَامَتَان لِلسُّلُوك المَعْرُوف.
examples.english: Tolerance and mutual respect are two signs of good behavior.

etymology.text: Derived from the passive participle of عَرَفَ (ʕarafa, “know”), verb form I.
